headline: Macquarie Maintains Neutral on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Raises Price Target to $326
summary: Macquarie  analyst Chad Beynon   maintains Hilton Worldwide Holdings (NYSE:HLT) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $320 to $326.

headline: Top 3 Consumer Stocks Which Could Rescue Your Portfolio In July
summary: The RSI can help traders identify oversold stocks in the consumer discretionary sector, such as HLT, KDK, and SLDP, that may have short-term potential.
